title: Spicy Dense Thai Oats Stir-fry
description: A bold and spicy brunch dish featuring oats, peppers, and a touch of spice for an invigorating whole30-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
In the wok, add coconut milk, tamarind paste, and fish sauce. Stir until combined.
Add bell pepper slices to the wok, stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.
Add chopped green onions, ground cumin, chili flakes, and salt to the wok. Stir well.
Pour in lime juice and continue to cook for another minute or two until the peppers are tender.
In a bowl, mix oats with tamarind paste, fish sauce, and salt. Mix well.
Transfer the oat mixture into the wok, stir everything together evenly.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the oats to absorb moisture.
Serve hot with a side of fresh herbs like cilantro or mint.
